---
title: "Week 14: Thanksgiving Break"
subtitle: "No Reading Assigned"
date: "2026-11-24"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## This Week

No class, no reading, no assignments. Enjoy the break.

If you want to get ahead, open the `mc451-final-project` template and start dropping your writing into the pre-built `.qmd` files. The more you finish now, the less you scramble during finals.

---

## Getting Help

- **Course website:** [Open Methods Hub](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/liaison-program/) --- check here first
- **Email:** aleith@siue.edu (allow 24 hours Mon--Fri)
- **Office hours:** Resume after break
- **Discord:** APLeith
